factors.summary: Demand is accelerating in certain regions and decelerating in others.

evidence.text: Sales in fiscal 2017 increased 7.3 percent compared to 2016. Organic sales increased 6.1 percent. Currency translation reduced sales by 0.3 percentage points, and acquisitions contributed 1.5 percentage points to sales growth. Pricing contributed less than one percentage point to growth.

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Demand is mixed with acceleration in some regions and deceleration in others.

factors.summary: Pricing power is stable and contributes minimally to growth.

evidence.text: Pricing contributed less than one percentage point to growth during the year.

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Pricing power is stable and contributes minimally to growth.

factors.summary: Organic revenue growth is accelerating in some regions and decelerating in others.

evidence.text: Organic sales increased 6.1 percent in 2017 compared to 2016. Organic sales decreased 3.9 percent in 2016 compared to 2015.

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Organic revenue growth is mixed with acceleration in some regions and deceleration in others.

factors.summary: Unit volumes or transaction counts are growing in some regions and declining in others.

evidence.text: Sales in the United States increased year over year, led by strength in the automotive and consumer industries. Sales in Latin America were mixed with growth led by Mexico, partially offset by declines across the rest of the region.

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: Unit volumes or transaction counts are mixed with growth in some regions and declines in others.

factors.summary: End markets are growing fastest in Asia Pacific and Europe, Middle East and Africa, while slowing in the United States and Latin America.

evidence.text: Asia Pacific sales increased year over year, with strong growth across the region, particularly within the semiconductor industry. Sales in the United States declined year over year, mainly due to weakness in heavy industries, particularly oil and gas.

sentiment.label: neutral
sentiment.rationale: End markets are mixed with strong growth in some regions and slowing in others.
